summary: Successfully tested Inflation Monitor panel updates including historical CPI data (1965-2026), base year markers, and value color matching. All backend APIs return live data from State Bank of Pakistan with 656+ YoY and 711+ MoM data points spanning 60+ years across 8 base year periods.
passed_tests: GET /api/cpi-yoy-historical returns 200 status
GET /api/cpi-yoy-historical returns 656 data points (1965-2026)
GET /api/cpi-yoy-historical returns 8 base year markers
Each historical data point includes base_year field
GET /api/cpi-mom-historical returns 200 status
GET /api/cpi-mom-historical returns 711 data points (1964-2026)
GET /api/cpi-mom-historical returns 8 base year markers
API source is 'State Bank of Pakistan'
API type fields correctly set to 'yoy' and 'mom'
Inflation Panel values display in white color (rgb(248, 250, 252) = #F8FAFC)
Inflation Panel colors match Economic Indicators panel (using --color-text CSS variable)
CPI YoY modal opens correctly
Time range selector includes new 10Y and 20Y options
Time range selector: YTD, 1Y, 2Y, 5Y, 10Y, 20Y, ALL all present and working
ALL time range shows full 60-year history (Jul 65 to Feb 26)
Chart tooltip shows base year information (e.g., 'Base Year: 2015-16')
Purple info message displays: 'Purple lines indicate CPI base year changes. Different base years are not directly comparable.'
Modal footer shows '656 DATA POINTS' for YoY
Modal footer shows '711 DATA POINTS' for MoM
Modal footer shows 'SOURCE: STATE BANK OF PAKISTAN'
CPI MoM modal opens correctly with bar chart
CPI MoM ALL view shows historical data from Aug 64
5% target reference line visible on YoY chart
seed_data_creation: None needed - CPI historical data is fetched live from State Bank of Pakistan EasyData API using 8 different series codes for different base year periods
context_for_next_testing_agent: CPI Historical data feature fully implemented and tested. Backend combines data from 8 SBP API series (CPI_HISTORICAL_APIS config in server.py). YoY data: 656 points from 1965-07-31 to 2026-02-28. MoM data: 711 points from 1964-08-31 to 2026-02-28. Base year markers: [1959-60, 1969-70, 1975-76, 1980-81, 1990-91, 2000-01, 2007-08, 2015-16]. Time range selectors now include 10Y and 20Y options. Purple reference lines mark base year changes on chart. Inflation panel values use white color (--color-text CSS variable) matching Economic Indicators panel.

live_data_verified.source: State Bank of Pakistan EasyData API
